audience_policies.source_phrase: (PRINTABLE) · This pass admits up to four people (adult, senior, child, or college) at a cost of $20 each. · Children under age 3 are always admitted free. · This is not a ticket. · Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted adm

coupon.source_phrase_block: (PRINTABLE) · This pass admits up to four people (adult, senior, child, or college) at a cost of $20 each. · Children under age 3 are always admitted free. · This is not a ticket. · Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people. . Advance reservations are not available for Library Pass holders. Patrons will be admitted regardless of if the Aquarium is sold out to the general public.
